description: Yango is a consumer and business technology platform offering services such as ride-hailing, delivery, maps, payments, and related business tools across multiple countries. Its public site also includes a partner program for embedding ride-request functionality into websites and apps.
summary: Yango exposes a public MCP server at `https://yango.com/mcp` and a partner-facing ride request integration documented on its partner-program pages, which uses Yango-issued partner credentials (`clid` and API key).

surfaces.name: Yango Ride Request API / Widget integration
